generated_oml:
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab
instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts control parameters to optimize crane system performance",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LogOperationalDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Records and stores crane operational data for historical analysis",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane system status and performance metrics"
]

instance ModelAccuracyValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of digital twin model accuracy against physical system data"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of anomalies and faults in crane system operation"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for system optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for recording operational data",
    DTDFVocab:provides LogOperationalDataAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure model accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection to identify system anomalies",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance GantrylibPython : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Core logic implementation using Python gantrylib module",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization of digital twin services using Docker",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing operational data",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive data visualization platform",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, FaultDetectionService, OptimalControlService
]

instance Fusion360CAD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD model creation using Autodesk Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance CapellaSystemModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling using Capella",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control management using GitHub repositories",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures the hoist's swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides wind speed measurements for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measurements of hoist swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the gantry crane system",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPython
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for motion simulation of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPython
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "System architecture visualization for lab-scale gantry crane using C4 Model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaSystemModeling
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are processed by the Control Application and sent through the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane. The system uses an MQTT Broker for inter-service communication, but specific details on command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture visualized using C4 Model with context and container diagrams; employs containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics between them, and evaluates the results against an acceptable threshold to ensure model accuracy and system reliability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system uses an MQTT Broker for inter-service communication, TimescaleDB as the database, and Grafana for dashboard visualization. Specific details on network topology, bandwidth and latency requirements, reliability and redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on-premise on a personal computer using Docker Compose for container orchestration, as indicated by the provided docker compose file and Figure 5 depicting component deployment on a local machine."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Uses MQTT protocol for real-time data exchange, TimescaleDB for time-series database storage, and Grafana for visualization dashboards, all containerized via Docker."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar utilizes AutomationML for digital twin modeling, a standard for industrial automation. The lab scale gantry crane system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization, adhering to software architecture standards."
]
